messages.content: Nah dude my friend is too retarded for twitter
Like i need everything in my reach
Yeah i do i wan die tbh
Cuz All i see is books on your setup
Some are academic and some are just … i like reading sometimes
All of my study resources are soft copies
And some books I read are already there, so yea
Yeah i hv  90 percent stuff on my ipad

Also I rarely use this pc, only on weekends when I have time

For the most part, it's just my laptop in random places throughout the city
after seeing all your setup i think i just need to work more and i will be posting later.
thats osm to see all these setup
organizing my desk so it may look good yrs
Mines a average student setup id say
